---
title: "OERs for Creators"
format: html
---

### Learning outcomes

By the end of this unit, learners will be able to:

-   Apply the {{< meta glossary.fiveRs >}} to ensure reusability.

-   Apply {{< meta glossary.FAIR >}} when designing educational resources.

-   Select and use appropriate open licences.

-   Structure and share OERs for maximum longevity and adaptability.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-align="center" width="50"}](/OERs%20for%20creators/Creator-Why%20OERs%20Matter.html)
